title: ServiceOffering
description: An admin-managed consultation/service the visitor can book. Stored in the 'service_offerings' collection (same name on web + iOS). USD funnel pricing (see BOOKING_SYSTEM_CANONICAL.md).

id.description: Doc id (also the stable slug, e.g. 'coffee_time')

billing.description: one_time = single session, monthly = membership, hourly = priced per hour

priceMaxUSD.description: Upper bound for ranged pricing (e.g. company assessment $50-$100/hr)

durationMinutes.description: Session length; 0 for membership plans without a fixed slot

requiresScheduling.description: true if the offering books a specific time slot (default true for one_time/hourly, false for monthly)

features.description: Bullet points shown on the offering card
